mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_news WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

SELECT symbol, news_id AS newsId, headline, summary, url, source, published_at AS publishedAt, raw_json AS rawJson, fetched_at AS fetchedAt FROM company_news WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY published_at DESC, news_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO company_news ( symbol, news_id, headline, summary, url, source, published_at, raw_json, fetched_at ) VALUES
( #{item.symbol}, #{item.newsId}, #{item.headline}, #{item.summary}, #{item.url}, #{item.source}, #{item.publishedAt}, #{item.rawJson}, #{item.fetchedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE headline = VALUES(headline), summary = VALUES(summary), url = VALUES(url), source = VALUES(source), published_at = VALUES(published_at), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at)
